allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('results',{}\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in r.items\(\) if k != 'cpu' and k != 'mem' and k != 'disk'},indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('results',{}\); print\('keys:', list\(r.keys\(\)\)\); s=r.get\('setup_time'\); print\('setup_time:', s\); print\('npu_session:', r.get\('npu_session',{}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('Results keys:', list\(d.get\('results',{}\).keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('results',{}\), dict\) else 'not a dict'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d.get\('status'\)\); r=d.get\('results',{}\); print\('Keys:', list\(r.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(r, dict\) else 'not dict'\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in \(r.items\(\) if isinstance\(r, dict\) else []\) if 'time' in k.lower\(\) or 'boot' in k.lower\(\) or 'uptime' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Uptime:', d.get\('uptime'\)\); print\('CPU:', d.get\('cpu_usage'\), '%, Memory:', d.get\('memory_usage'\), '%, Sessions:', d.get\('session_count'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('fortimanager.db'\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\('SELECT id, name, ip_address, model, created_at FROM devices ORDER BY id'\); import json; rows = cursor.fetchall\(\); print\('All devices in current database:'\); for row in rows: print\(f'ID: {row[0]} | Name: {row[1]} | IP: {row[2]} | Model: {row[3]} | Created: {row[4]}'\); conn.close\(\)")
